title: juncus effusus subsp. laxus
intro: Juncus effusus subsp. laxus, also known as the lax-flowering rush or soft rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus effusus subsp. laxus include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Juncus effusus subsp. laxus can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat urinary tract infections and skin conditions.
